title: OSI Model & TCP/IP Stack
description: Compare the 7-layer OSI model to the 4-layer TCP/IP stack. Understand the role of each layer, encapsulation, and how data flows from application to physical.

title: Routing Protocols
slidesTitle: BGP, OSPF & RIP – How Routers Think
description: Learn how routers exchange topology information. Compare distance-vector (RIP) vs link-state (OSPF) routing. Understand BGP as the internet's backbone protocol.
